category_sources: source_facts.description says it provides Mozilla's Universal Charset Detector C/C++ API.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage and source_facts.repo both point to the official GitHub project, whose README is the best supplied documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/Joungkyun/libchardet, so repo enrichment was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies charset detection and C/C++ API; source_facts.executables lists chardet-config.
